mission.title: Install and Configure Operator Framework on Kubernetes
mission.description: The Operator SDK is a toolkit for building Kubernetes applications, known as Operators, which simplifies the process of managing complex stateful applications on Kubernetes. By using high-level APIs and scaffolding tools, it streamlines Operator development and enhances modularity.

steps.title: Install OLM (Operator Lifecycle Manager)
steps.description:
Install OLM using the official release manifests:
```bash
curl -Lo install.sh https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-lifecycle-manager/releases/download/v0.31.0/install.sh
chmod +x install.sh
./install.sh v0.31.0
```
Or manually:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-lifecycle-manager/releases/download/v0.31.0/crds.yaml
kubectl apply -f https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-lifecycle-manager/releases/download/v0.31.0/olm.yaml
```

steps.title: Install the operator-sdk CLI (optional)
steps.description:
Install the Operator SDK for building operators:
```bash
curl -Lo operator-sdk https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk/releases/download/v1.38.0/operator-sdk_linux_amd64
chmod +x operator-sdk
sudo mv operator-sdk /usr/local/bin/
```

steps.title: Verify OLM is running
steps.description:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n olm
kubectl get pods -n operators
kubectl get csv -n olm
```

steps.title: Install an operator from OperatorHub
steps.description:
Browse operators at https://operatorhub.io and install one:
```bash
kubectl create -f https://operatorhub.io/install/prometheus.yaml
kubectl get csv -n operators
```

troubleshooting.title: CatalogSource pods failing
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
kubectl get catalogsource -n olm
kubectl logs -l olm.catalogSource=operatorhubio-catalog -n olm
```

troubleshooting.title: Subscription stuck in UpgradePending
troubleshooting.description:
Check the install plan:
```bash
kubectl get installplan -n operators
kubectl describe subscription <name> -n operators
```

troubleshooting.title: CSV in Failed phase
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
kubectl get csv -n operators
kubectl describe csv <name> -n operators
```

resolution.summary: OLM is installed for managing operator lifecycle on Kubernetes, with access to OperatorHub catalogs.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have Kubernetes cluster access and have installed Helm and kubectl.
